evals.prompt: Check the attached design docs and tell me whether we can read the app's saved transcripts on a Windows machine. Verify where they're actually stored and write up a feasibility report.
evals.expected_output: A report that reads the docs first, verifies the real Windows storage path (not assumed from another OS), separates confirmed facts from items needing verification, and ends with a verdict plus a test plan with PASS criteria.
expectations: Reads/cites the provided source docs before asserting a conclusion
Verifies the Windows-specific storage path rather than copying a path from a different platform, and says how it was verified
Keeps confirmed facts separate from claims still needing verification
Ends with an explicit feasible/not-feasible verdict and a concrete test plan with PASS criteria

evals.prompt: This feasibility report has the wrong storage location and mixes up two platforms. Fix it.
evals.expected_output: Targeted edits that correct only the wrong/conflated claims after re-reading the relevant regions, keeping facts and unverified claims separated rather than rewriting wholesale.
expectations: Re-reads the affected region before editing it
Corrects the conflated-platform and wrong-path claims specifically rather than rewriting the whole document
Distinguishes the now-confirmed value from anything still unverified
